hero_description: The STEAM+ ecosystem that transforms schools and homes. From school curriculum to learning adventures at home.
eba_description: Applied Basic Education. We integrate technology, ethics and critical thinking into the school schedule, aligned with NEM.

levels.title: EBA Kids
levels.description: Playful introduction to STEAM concepts. We awaken curiosity through exploration.

levels.title: EBA Advanced
levels.description: Learn to integrate technology as a tool in every aspect of your life. Complex projects with social impact.

levels.title: EBA Xpert
levels.description: Specialty areas implementing technology tools, math concepts and science integration.

virtual_lab_description: A safe environment where students interact with simulators of hand tools, power tools, CNC machines and technological components before touching real hardware.
virtual_lab_caption: Interact with the test lab. Experience College.
praxis_subtitle: Like a loom that interweaves theory with practice, our methodology weaves knowledge and skills in three continuous phases.
praxis_step1_description: We prepare the warp. This is the strategic planning phase where we define the challenge, select the tools and structure the purpose of learning.
praxis_step2_description: We weave the experience. This is the moment of total immersion ("Flow State"). Students experiment, create and connect ideas in a dynamic environment.
praxis_step3_description: We capture the weave. Critical reflection and evaluation phase. We analyze the final result, celebrate achievements and identify areas for improvement.
companions_description: Our digital characters guide your training in a 100% safe environment. Hover over them to discover their different facets.
safety_description: Your safety is our priority. In our videos and materials, no real people appear, only digital avatars. This creates a risk-free learning environment focused 100% on content.
profile_description: Each completed mission adds points to your profile. We align your favorite activities with Future Careers and develop your Power Skills (Leadership, Resilience, Communication).
parents_title_part2: This is the gift that transforms.
parents_description: Boost your children's talent without the hassle of commuting. Receive progress reports and watch them develop real skills for professional life.
after_school_description: Forget boring classes! We turn your living room into an Innovation Lab. Receive your kit, connect to the mission and build the future from home.
after_school_kit_description: No impossible shopping lists. Receive a box with electronics, sensors and tools ready to create real prototypes.
after_school_platform_description: The curriculum is experienced like a video game. Unlock levels, earn badges and level up your professional profile while you develop skills to use and create with technology.
after_school_mentorship_description: You are not alone in space. Connect with our Expert Mentors to solve technical questions and present your inventions in community.

events.gathering_description: The congress where our students showcase their projects, connect with experts and celebrate innovation.
events.franchise_description: Turnkey model for entrepreneurs. Bring certified STEAM education to your community.
events.agora_description: Are you a teacher? Discover our continuous training and pedagogical certification.
